name: daily_briefing
description: Multi-source daily briefing: memory, open loops, schedules, shopping, and agent sessions — weather-free, calendar-less v1

steps.description: Pull recent daily summaries and notes from memory

args.query: yesterday summary events notes day decisions

steps.description: Recall open loops, commitments, and household context

args.query: commitments open loops tasks priorities today

steps.description: List standing schedules and upcoming fires
Current shopping list for the digest

Compose a concise spoken daily briefing (under 2 minutes aloud). Sections only when non-empty: (1) priorities / open loops from memory, (2) schedules due or standing, (3) shopping list highlights (count + top items), (4) agent session status (working / needs input / done + rough cost if known), (5) one suggested next action. Warm, supervisory tone. No weather, no invented calendar. Skip empty sections in one short clause.
